Run desired-gain QGSI using trait GEBVs

run_qgsi_desired_gain.Rd

Computes a desired-gain adaptation of the quadratic genomic selection index.

Usage

run_qgsi_desired_gain(init_data, gebv_data, trait_cols, id_col = "GenoID",
  dg, W_d = NULL, quadratic_diag_weights = NULL, lower_is_better = NULL,
  center_traits = TRUE, scale_traits = TRUE, impute_missing = TRUE,
  return_components = TRUE, debug = TRUE)

Arguments

init_data

Metadata table.

gebv_data

Trait GEBV table.

trait_cols

Trait columns.

id_col

Identifier column.

dg

Desired-gain vector.

W_d

Quadratic matrix.

quadratic_diag_weights

Diagonal weights if W_d is NULL.

lower_is_better

Traits to flip.

center_traits

Center GEBVs.

scale_traits

Scale GEBVs.

impute_missing

Impute missing GEBVs.

return_components

Return linear and quadratic parts.

debug

Print debug messages.

Value

A list containing the transformed trait space, ranked genotypes, and component summaries.
